operate_date.text: วันที่เปลี่ยน

root.sql: SELECT sc_amnat_grade_edit.seq_no ,sc_amnat_grade_edit.entry_id ,sc_amnat_grade_edit.operate_date ,sc_amnat_grade_edit.pre_grade ,sc_amnat_grade_edit.remark ,sc_amnat_grade_ucf_chg.chg_desc ,sc_amnat_grade_ucf_chg.chg_code ,sc_amnat_grade_edit.membership_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as member_name ,sc_amnat_grade_edit.grade ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name FROM sc_amnat_grade_edit ,sc_amnat_grade_ucf_chg ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group WHERE sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and sc_amnat_grade_edit.chg_code = sc_amnat_grade_ucf_chg.chg_code and sc_amnat_grade_edit.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no /*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ,sc_amnat_grade_edit.membership_no ,sc_amnat_grade_edit.seq_no
